---
# Run using quarto render paper.qmd --to pdf
title: "datasci 207 Group Project Final Report"

author:  
  - name: "David Griffin (david_griffin@berkeley.edu)"
  - name: "Anthony Li (anthonyleeqy@berkeley.edu)"
  - name: "Sabrina Sun (yolosun4488@berkeley.edu)"
  - name: "Duy Vo (duyvo@berkeley.edu)"

abstract: |
  \begin{center}
  \url{https://github.com/duygithub/berkeley_datasci_207_proj}
  \end{center}

format: pdf
toc: true
fontsize: 10pt
geometry:
  - margin=.75in
bibliography: references.bib
---

{{< pagebreak >}}

# Abstract
{{< embed 10_abstract.ipynb >}}

# Introduction
{{< embed 11_introduction.ipynb >}}

# Related Work
{{< embed 20_related_work.ipynb >}}

# Data

## Data Set Description
{{< embed 30_data_description.ipynb >}}

## Data Preprocessing, Distribution across Training, and Validation
{{< embed 31_data_processing.ipynb >}}

## EDA and Visualizations
{{< embed 32_eda_visualizations.ipynb >}}

# Methods

## Baseline
{{< embed 40_baseline.ipynb >}}

## Method 1 - XGBoost
{{< embed 41_method_1.ipynb >}}

## Method 2 - Neural Network
{{< embed 42_method_2.ipynb >}}

# Experiments & Results
{{< embed 50_experiments_results.ipynb >}}

# Conclusion
{{< embed 60_conclusion.ipynb >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

# Team Contributions
{{< embed 70_team_contributions.ipynb >}}

{{< pagebreak >}}

# References
::: {#refs}
:::
